title: tinnea mirabilis
side_effects: Tinnea mirabilis can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory problems in sensitive individuals. Prolonged use or excessive consumption of the plant's extracts can lead to stomach ulcers, diarrhea, and nausea due to its toxic properties. Additionally, Tinnea mirabilis may interact with certain medications, causing adverse reactions or reducing their efficacy. In rare cases, improper use of the plant may even trigger anaphylaxis, a life-threatening allergic reaction requiring immediate medical attention.
